text:
Created attachment 244036
Path to update to JuliaMono 0.050

Update juliamono to 0.050

Changes from 0.048 include new glyphs (added in 0.049) and a new style set for small parentheses.
    
A more detailed changelog is also available:
  https://github.com/cormullion/juliamono/blob/v0.050/CHANGELOG.md
